title: Linking a board item to a new board

posts.author: Rhodesy (Matt Rhodes)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am attempting to create what feels like a simple process for briefing using two boards. One issue I’m having is that the two boards are not connected in anyway, which makes them somewhat redundant.

Process

• A form is used to enter data, which then makes up a submission board.
• Using automation, a status column is set to “Working on it”
• Using automation, once the status is set to “Working on it” a new board is created using a board template.

Is there a way or change I could make to link the submission board item to the new board which is created?
